description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof. The exterior is primarily finished in a muted pinkish-brown material, complemented by large windows and a mix of glass and solid surfaces. A prominent garage is attached to the front, with a driveway leading up to it, and a small landscaped area with shrubs and trees adds greenery to the property. The rear of the house includes a fenced backyard and a detached structure, possibly a shed or secondary garage. Tall, narrow trees line the side yard, providing privacy and a touch of nature. The overall layout is elongated, maximizing the use of a narrow urban lot.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with a pinkish-brown exterior, large windows, attached garage, and landscaped front and back yards.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, attached garage, and a landscaped area with a large shrub.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, fenced backyard, and detached secondary building.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the garage door, narrow side yard with trees, and the back entrance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the backyard, fencing, and additional greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, no porch, adjacent to a garage and landscaped area, minimal decorative elements
